creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Thank you for the report and followup.  Looking at this again and 
again, I'm afraid I cannot agree to this patch.  The case where 
the new OPTION is off would be exactly the same as what we have 
today, and if that is broken it will remain so. 

This means the one thing the patch adds is enabing V4L as an 
option in case someone wants to enable it, without concrete 
applications that benefit from it, I do not think the added 
complexity is worth it. 

If I misunderstood, and there are concrete applications users 
care about where this makes a difference I will be happy to 
reconsider, just the rationale I could not follow. 

(Take care, GNATS does not handle HTML mail very well.)
